title: A to Z My 1st Music Set, Kids Musical Instruments Set with Recorder, Tambourine, Maracas, Animal Design, 18+ Months
features: COMPLETE SET: Educational music set includes a recorder, tambourine, maracas and other percussion instruments, perfect for introducing children to rhythm and music
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for toddlers 18+ months, featuring chunky, easy-to-grip instruments with rounded edges for safe play
ENGAGING DESIGN: Colourful animal-themed instruments with charming safari characters make music learning fun and entertaining for little ones
DEVELOPMENTAL BENEFITS: Helps develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and early musical abilities through interactive play

100% Safe: these kids musical instruments for toddler are non-toxic, child-safe, made from a safe material. The high quality construction features a smooth, safe finish that your Baby can play with for hours
description: Introduce your little one to the magical world of music with the A to Z My 1st Music Set! Perfect for budding musicians aged 18 months and above, this delightful starter kit features an engaging collection of musical instruments adorned with charming animal designs. The set includes a child-friendly recorder in cheerful blue, perfect for first musical explorations, a colourful tambourine decorated with adorable safari animals, and fun maracas featuring cute animal motifs. Each instrument is sized just right for tiny hands, making it easy for toddlers to grip and play. The bright colours and playful animal characters will capture your child's imagination while they discover different sounds and rhythms. This musical set helps develop hand-eye coordination, listening skills, and creativity through musical play. The durable construction ensures these instruments can withstand enthusiastic playing, while the smooth, rounded edges provide safe handling for young children. Start your child's musical journey with this engaging instrument set that makes learning fun and interactive.
